page_content:
Prerequisite: EDCI680; or TLPL435.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI423, EDCI603, TLPL447 or TLPL633. Formerly: EDCI603.

TLPL634 Teaching Language Arts in Elementary Schools (3 Credits) Analysis of current issues, trends, and problems in language-arts instruction.
